name: Active Directory Module Load in PowerShell
description: Active Directory module loading in PowerShell is detected.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the security event: 'Active Directory Module Load in PowerShell'. Event details: {event_details}

parameters.name: event_details
parameters.description: Details of the detected security event, including the original query information: `norm_id=WinServer event_id=4103 command="Import-Module" payload="*ActiveDirectory*"`.
